findings: Launcher seeds commander progress_dir, swarm-state.json, and child-agents.jsonl, and exports STAMPEDE_PROGRESS_DIR to commander.
Monitor launch uses RUN_ID and BASE_DIR for run-scoped context.
No explicit Agent Pulse channel beyond swarm-state.json heartbeat fields.
Fallback watch mode does not read commander progress artifacts, reducing pulse visibility.
Prereq warning for missing monitor may overstate skip risk.
